subject: Probable GRB in INTEGRAL SPI-ACS
body:
M. Turler, J. Borkowski, N. Mowlavi on behalf of the ISDC
shift-team report:

A bright and short (~ 0.7 sec) probable GRB with a FRED-like shape
has been found in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS lightcurve on 2002-12-26
at 14:53:39 UT (53619 sec).
No position information is available.

The lightcurve file is available at:
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2002-12-26T14-53-39.3000-00000-00000-0.lc
